title: clematis × divaricata
intro: Clematis × divaricata, also known as the 'Virgin's Bower' or 'White Clematis', is a type of flowering plant in the Clematis genus that is native to China and Japan. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Clematis × divaricata include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
